description_long: This sconce features a cylindrical body with a textured, diamond-patterned surface, giving it a modern and slightly industrial appearance. The main cylinder is attached to a circular mounting plate via a short, sturdy stem, suggesting it is designed to be fixed to a flat surface. The open end of the cylinder likely houses the light source, directing illumination downward. The mounting plate is smooth and flat, providing a clean transition to the supporting stem. The overall finish is matte, with a light gray color dominating the exterior. The design is minimalistic, with no visible fasteners or ornate details, emphasizing function and contemporary style.
description: A modern, cylindrical sconce with a diamond-patterned surface and a smooth circular mounting plate, finished in matte light gray. The design is minimalistic and functional.
description_view_0: The cylindrical body with its diamond-patterned texture and the circular mounting plate are clearly visible, showing the sconce's downward orientation.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the connection between the stem and the mounting plate, as well as the textured surface wrapping around the cylinder.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the top of the cylinder and the mounting plate, with the diamond pattern visible along the side.
description_view_3: The diamond-patterned cylinder and the smooth mounting plate are both visible, similar to view 0 but from the opposite side.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with a diamond-patterned cylindrical body and a smooth, unobtrusive mounting plate. Its clean lines and lack of ornamentation emphasize contemporary style.
